sections.title: Success Metrics & KPIs (Baseline)
sections.description: Da bismo dokazali impact, trebamo baseline mere PRE launch-a.

fields.label: Front desk volume (poziva / walk-in pitanja vezana za booking)
Mobile vs desktop traffic na website-u (iz GA4)
Conversion rate iz visitor → first class (%)
Definicija uspeha 90 dana posle launch-a: % bookings u app-u
% reduction u front desk booking calls
Target broj app installs (Add to Home Screen / Capacitor)
Postojeći website — da li ostaje kao landing ili app zamenjuje sve?
Email za booking confirmation, password reset, itd.
Dajete pristup DNS-u za DKIM/SPF/DMARC setup?
Data retention — koliko dana čuvamo brisanih account-a
Ko vlasnik koda i podataka u Supabase-u?
Multi-factor auth na admin nalog-ima — obavezno?
Ko prati error monitoring posle launch-a?
SLA očekivanja za bug fixes posle launch-a
